Institution.title: Institution
Institution.description: Represents a course institution including all structural, operational, and student management details.

name.description: The official name of the institution.

PortalSettings.title: PortalSettings
PortalSettings.description: Represents customizable home page portal-wide text elements.

welcomeHeading.description: The hero welcome title text displayed on the main directory page.

welcomeDescription.description: The description subtext underneath the welcome heading.

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp indicating when customization was last updated.

/institutions/{institutionId}.description: The central collection containing all course institutions registered under the multi-tenant course governance SaaS platform.

/portal_settings/{settingId}.description: Configuration settings for customized portal elements such as headings and descriptions.
